DEFENDANT THOMAS GUEVARA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO 12/7/05 PER MOVING PARTY. JUDGE:PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON CSR# 1558. (301/BUSCH)

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-30-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: JOSEPH SACRAMENTO FOR PLAINTIFF I & C,LLC
BRIAN HOCHLEUTNER FOR DEFENDANT THOMAS GUEVARA

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TRIAL DATE OFF CALENDAR.MR SACRAMENTO HAS AUTHORITY TO ACT ON BEFHALF OF PLAINTIFF. TERMS OF SETTLEMENT PLACED ON RECORD AS FOLLOWS:DEFENDANT TO PAY PLAINTIFF $2559 (RENT FROM 9/1/05 - 12/30/05) ON OR BEFORE 5PM, 12/12/05. TO BE PAID BY CASHIERS CHECK OR MONEY ORDER TO REALTY WEST AT 2170 SUTTER STREET. PLAINTIFF WILL FILE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO PAY,PLAINTIFF, WITH 24 HOUR NOTICE, TO FILE EXPARTE APPLICATION AND ORDER FOR JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION OF 6288 3RD STREET AND ALL RENT DUE AND OWING.
DEFENDANT AGREES THAT NO OTHER ADULTS RESIDE, NO FURTHER STAY OF EXECUTION, RELEASES PLAINTIFF FROM ALL CLAIMS. BY 1/10/06 PLAINTIFF WILL MAKE THE FOLLOWING REPAIRS: REMOVE GARBAGE TO BACKYARD; FIX - WINDOWS - HOLES - HEATER - DRY WALL; REPAIR OUTLETS; REPLACE FRONT DOOR; WATER HEATER TO BE SECURED; EXTERMINATION; WATER PRESSURE; FAUCETS; CRACKS IN WATER PIPE; INSTALL SECURITY DOOR; SMOKE DETECTOR; GAPS REPAIRED AROUND DOORS AND WINDOWS.
BOTH PARTIES AGREE TO TERMS.

JUDGE PRO TEM:ANDREW WESTLEY ; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; REPORTER:BELDON YEE (218)
